query:
SELECT id, authorName FROM author_profiles 
WHERE authorName REGEXP '^[0-9]'
   OR authorName REGEXP '^(The |How to |Why |Never |Always |Making |Leading |Getting |Building |Mastering |Becoming |Thinking |Selling |From |Beyond |Inside |Toward )'
   OR authorName IN ('Active Listening', 'Leaders Eat Last', 'Radical Candor', 'Meditations', 'Quit', 'Objections', 'Positioning', 'Nudge', 'Misbehaving')
   OR authorName LIKE 'TEST %'
   OR authorName LIKE '% TEST'
ORDER BY authorName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT id, authorName FROM author_profiles 
WHERE authorName REGEXP '^[0-9]'
   OR authorName REGEXP '^(The |How to |Why |Never |Always |Making |Leading |Getting |Building |Mastering |Becoming |Thinking |Selling |From |Beyond |Inside |Toward )'
   OR authorName IN ('Active Listening', 'Leaders Eat Last', 'Radical Candor', 'Meditations', 'Quit', 'Objections', 'Positioning', 'Nudge', 'Misbehaving')
   OR authorName LIKE 'TEST %'
   OR authorName LIKE '% TEST'
ORDER BY authorName;
